audit_items.proof_trace: field2json() can return NULL when repeated=false and field type is MESSAGE (line 214 calls parse_msg which returns NULL for invalid descriptors). parse_msg() dereferences the result immediately at line 270 (*field_json) without any NULL check.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker provides protobuf message with nested MESSAGE field having invalid/corrupted descriptor, causing parse_msg() to return NULL which gets dereferenced in the calling parse_msg(), resulting in segmentation fault.
